claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Consumer-selected div, section, ul, or ol
semantics.selectionPolicy: Only the closed native element union is accepted.

layout.intrinsic: A one-dimensional flex column uses semantic stack gaps and zero minimum inline sizes.
layout.logicalDirection: List indentation uses padding-inline-start and follows document direction.
layout.overflow: Content is not clipped; descendants may grow in block size when text expands.

consumerResponsibilities: Use section only when the surrounding document supplies an appropriate heading.
Render li children for ul and ol roots and do not remove list semantics with role overrides.
Revalidate focus visibility and reading order after adding consumer positioning or overflow.
